TU Delft questions about management of personal
1. Please detail what type of personal data you will collect, for what purpose,

2. Will you be sharing personal data with individuals/organisations outside of

3. What is the legal ground for personal data processing?
4. Will the personal data be shared with others after the end of the research

5. Does the processing of the personal data results in a high risk to the data
If the processing of the personal data results in a high risk to the data
subjects, it is required to perform a Data Protection Impact Assessment (DPIA).
In order to determine if there is a high risk for the data subjects, please check
if any of the options below that are applicable to the processing of the personal
data during your research (check all that apply).
If two or more of the options listed below apply, you will have to complete the
DPIA. Please get in touch with the privacy team: privacy-tud@tudelft.nl to
receive support with DPIA. If only one of the options listed below applies, your
project might need a DPIA. Please get in touch with the privacy team: privacy-
tud@tudelft.nl to get advice as to whether DPIA is necessary.
If you have any additional comments, please add them in the box below.
